mapper.sql: s.DIC_ID, s.DIC_NAME,s.DIC_TYPE, s.DIC_KEY, s.DIC_VALUE, s.DIC_SYMBOL, s.CREATED_BY, s.CREATED_DATE, s.LAST_UPDATED_BY, s.LAST_UPDATED_DATE
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_dic where dic_type in
#{item.dicType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_DIC SET DIC_NAME = #{dicName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DIC_TYPE = #{dicType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DIC_KEY = #{dicKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DIC_VALUE = #{dicValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DIC_SYMBOL = #{dicSymbol,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE DIC_ID = #{dicId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
